title: [harness] autopilot scope-guard가 mid-run 사용자-리뷰 재편집을 막아 bypass 강제 (wi_260713tsw)
source_request:
[harness] autopilot scope-guard가 mid-run 사용자-리뷰 재편집을 막아 bypass 강제 (wi_260713tsw)

wi_260713nlg autopilot 중 발견. 로컬 work item wi_260713tsw로 조사 완료(handoff: .ditto/local/handoff/wi_260713tsw.md). **수정은 별도 승인 단위.**

## 증상
passed impl 노드를 사용자 피드백으로 재편집할 때 PreToolUse scope guard가 Edit/Write 차단 → implementer가 DITTO_AUTOPILOT_BYPASS로 우회.

## 원인 (조사 완료, file:line)
- 가드 checkAutopilotLease(src/hooks/pre-tool-use.ts:675-748)는 running 노드 lease만 union. passed 노드는 terminal 시 lease 제거(autopilot-loop.ts:2430).
- verify/review 노드의 file_scope:[] (빈 declared, undefined 아님) → scope_source='declared' → fail-open(:713) 미발동 → 빈 allow-list 차단.
- passed impl 노드를 user-feedback로 reopen하는 경로 부재.
- 직교 hole: Bash 쓰기는 lease-gate 밖(pre-tool-use.ts:767-822).

## 권장 수정 (순서)
1. (선호) 기존 reopen 전이(autopilot-graph.ts:100)로 passed impl 노드를 user-feedback 시 pending 재개 → fresh lease 재인가. bounded 필요(K-cap). ADR-20260710·ADR-20260627 안에서 same-unit 재-dispatch.
2. read-only owner 빈 declared scope를 fail-open 처리 / []→omit 정규화(autopilot-graph.ts:311).
3. review 페이즈에 passed mutating 노드 scope union(최소선호).

## 부수 학습
generated_nodes 저작 시 read-only 노드는 file_scope를 [] 아니라 omit해야 fail-open 정상 작동.
goal: Fix the autopilot mid-run scope-guard bug (#31): a passed implement node can be reopened on explicit user feedback so the re-edit runs under a fresh active-node lease (auto re-implement) instead of forcing DITTO_AUTOPILOT_BYPASS, and the PreToolUse guard stops treating a read-only node's empty write-set lease as a deny-all — all within the frozen acceptance-criteria graph as one approval unit.

acceptance_criteria.statement: An active-node lease with an empty file_scope no longer causes checkAutopilotLease to block an edit (empty write-set is excluded from the enforcement set), while a concurrently-active mutating node's non-empty declared file_scope is still enforced — an out-of-scope edit under that mutating node still blocks.

evidence.summary: RED: ac-1(a) Expected 0 Received 2 at test:960 (empty deny-all)
4739 pass / 11 skip / 0 fail across 373 files (12317 expect) — regression fixed, ac-8
ac-1: 215 pass / 0 fail (prior verifier fresh run)
ac-2..7: 12 pass / 0 fail (prior verifier fresh run)

acceptance_criteria.statement: A user-action CLI entrypoint reopens a passed implement node (passed->pending) and re-dispatch re-grants a fresh active-node lease scoped to that node, so the re-edit passes the guard without DITTO_AUTOPILOT_BYPASS; the reopen is not produced by an autonomous record-result payload flag.

4739 pass / 11 skip / 0 fail across 373 files (12317 expect) — regression fixed, ac-8

ac-2..7: 12 pass / 0 fail (prior verifier fresh run)

acceptance_criteria.statement: The reopened implement node re-dispatches its implement owner with the user's feedback carried into the delegation packet (auto re-implement).

evidence.summary: RED: import error reopenImplementNode not found (genuine new-symbol red)
4739 pass / 11 skip / 0 fail across 373 files (12317 expect) — regression fixed, ac-8

ac-2..7: 12 pass / 0 fail (prior verifier fresh run)

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reopening a passed implement node re-arms every transitive downstream verify/review node to pending (re-verify) without destructive teardown/regeneration (node ids preserved), and the completion verdict reflects the fresh re-verification — a pre-reopen stale downstream pass can no longer close an acceptance criterion over the re-mutated node (no false-green).

ac-1: 215 pass / 0 fail (prior verifier fresh run)
ac-2..7: 12 pass / 0 fail (prior verifier fresh run)

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reopen is available only while the graph has a non-terminal node (the mid-run guard-block window); a reopen attempt on a fully-terminal graph is refused as out of scope.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reopen conserves the frozen acceptance-criteria id-set via the existing intentDriftGate/purposePreserving invariant; it cannot add or alter acceptance criteria.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Repeated reopens of the same node are bounded by a per-node reopen cap; at the cap the node stops and reports instead of reopening again.

follow_ups.note: reopen ↔ cross-WI retro/memory 학습 정합: reopen이 노드를 재실행해 run 결과가 바뀌어도 retro 흡수가 per-WI 안정키(retroMemoryEventId, retro-measure.ts:178)로 idempotent(first-pass-wins, autopilot-loop.ts:3458)라 first-pass(폐기) 학습이 durable memory+escape_recurrence/outcome_floor ledger에 잔존 → 미래 WI의 warmStartMemoryContext(autopilot-loop.ts:1295)가 사라진 결과를 학습. reopen 시 per-WI retro 메모리/메트릭 무효화 또는 재정합 필요. (wi_260713wxq coverage 스윕 discovered, out_of_scope)
